file_nodes.name: display.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides rich ANSI-colored text formatting helpers for bird cards, bonus cards, player boards, and game state used by the CLI agent display layer.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package entry point for the cards subsystem, re-exporting parsed card data from the schema and parse subpackages.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package entry point for the card parsing subsystem, re-exporting the full parse pipeline including catalog, fields, loader, matchers, and power parsers.

file_nodes.name: catalog.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides stable bird and bonus card catalog accessors (count, index lookup by card ID) backed by the parsed card list.

file_nodes.name: fields.py
file_nodes.summary: Parses individual bird and bonus card fields from raw JSON records into typed schema objects (habitat, food cost, nest type, bonus thresholds, goal categories).

file_nodes.name: loader.py
file_nodes.summary: Loads and caches all bird, bonus, and round-goal card data from JSON source files, providing the singleton parsed card list used throughout the engine.

file_nodes.name: matchers.py
file_nodes.summary: Contains 40 regex-based matcher functions for brown/white bird power text, each registering a specific EffectKind pattern via the parse registry decorator.

file_nodes.name: pink_matchers.py
file_nodes.summary: Contains 5 regex-based matcher functions for pink (when-activated) bird powers, registered via the parse registry's pink_pattern decorator.

file_nodes.name: power.py
file_nodes.summary: Orchestrates bird power text parsing, extracting one or more Effect objects from raw power text by normalizing and dispatching to registered matchers.

file_nodes.name: registry.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides the pattern and pink_pattern decorator-based registry for bird power matchers, mapping regex patterns to EffectKind constructors.

file_nodes.name: tags.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines tag constants and a to_int utility for mapping string tags from raw card JSON to integer indices used in encoding.

file_nodes.name: schema.py
file_nodes.summary: Core Pydantic data models and StrEnum types for all card domain objects: Habitat, Food, NestType, EffectKind, BirdCost, Effect, Power, Bird, BonusCard, EndRoundGoal, and their raw JSON record counterparts.

file_nodes.name: decisions.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the complete Decision/Choice type hierarchy used across the game engine: 41 Choice subclasses and corresponding Decision[C] containers covering every agent decision point from setup through end-of-round.

file_nodes.name: choice_encode.py
file_nodes.summary: Encodes agent choice vectors for every Decision subclass into fixed-size float32 tensors for the RL policy network, including board-impact deltas for scoring and bonus goals.

file_nodes.name: actions.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements the four main Wingspan turn actions (play bird, gain food, lay eggs, draw cards) as free functions taking the Engine as first argument, including helper logic for enumerating playable birds and offering birdfeeder resets.

file_nodes.name: core.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the Engine class â€” the central game orchestrator that owns the turn loop, setup phase, Agent protocol plumbing, and ask() validation gateway.

file_nodes.name: helpers.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides food cost evaluation helpers: cost_meets checks if a food pool satisfies a bird cost, and enumerate_payments generates all valid payment combinations.

file_nodes.name: log_format.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides structured log message formatting for game events (setup, dealt hand, turn summaries) emitted by the Engine to the display agent.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package entry point for the engine powers subsystem, re-exporting all bird power handler submodules.

file_nodes.name: dispatch.py
file_nodes.summary: Core power dispatching logic: routes an EffectKind to its registered handler, applies effects, offers activation veto, and implements the shared lay_one_egg_on_nest helper used by multiple powers.

file_nodes.name: drafting.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for bird-drafting effects: play an additional bird here, draw-N-plus-one-draft, and draw-bonus-keep mechanics.

file_nodes.name: egg_trade.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for egg-trading effects: discard an egg to gain wild food or draw cards.

file_nodes.name: grants.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for the largest group of bird power effects: food gain (supply, feeder, birdfeeder), egg laying, card drawing, caching, tucking, and combination tuck-then effects.

file_nodes.name: multi_actor.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for effects involving multiple players: each-player-gains-a-die-in-order and all-players-lay-egg-on-nest.

file_nodes.name: nest_aggregate.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for nest-aggregation effects: lay an egg on every bird of a given nest type, gain all food of a type from the feeder, and tuck from deck with payment.

file_nodes.name: predator_repeat.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for predator-hunt, move-bird-if-rightmost, repeat-brown-power, and repeat-predator-power effects.

file_nodes.name: registry.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides the @handles decorator registry that maps EffectKind variants to power handler functions, and handler_for lookup used by dispatch.

file_nodes.name: tray_trade.py
file_nodes.summary: Power handlers for tray-related effects: draw all from tray, trade wild food, and fewest-habitat conditional gains (die or card).

file_nodes.name: reactors.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements pink power reactor triggers: fires when-activated reactions from all opponent birds for lay-egg, predator success, play-bird, and gain-food events.

file_nodes.name: scoring.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements all Wingspan scoring logic: round goal evaluation and standing, bonus card qualifying counts and VP, final scoring, and per-choice score delta computation for the RL encoder.

file_nodes.name: state.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines all mutable game state models: GameState (full game), Player, Board, PlayedBird, Birdfeeder, FoodPool, and RoundGoalResult â€” the core data layer for the simulation.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Top-level package initializer for the wingspan simulator; currently minimal (2 non-empty lines) but marks the root package boundary.

file_nodes.name: architecture.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the canonical neural network topology descriptor `ModelArchitecture` and supporting parameter-counting utilities (`count_parameters`, `ParamReport`) used by `PolicyValueNet` and the HTML report to describe and size every model block.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package initializer for the backward-compatibility shim layer; imports from `v0_0` and `v0_1` to expose version-routing helpers at the `compat` namespace level.

file_nodes.name: v0_0.py
file_nodes.summary: Backward-compatibility shim for artifact version 0.0: provides the legacy choice encoding layout, `PolicyValueNetV00` subclass that uses the old flat choice encoder, and reconstruction helpers that translate old encoded tensors to the current layout.

file_nodes.name: v0_1.py
file_nodes.summary: Backward-compatibility shim for artifact version 0.1: provides the legacy card-feature matrix layout (without current bonus embeddings) and `PolicyValueNetV01` / `SetupNetV01` subclasses that override the card encoder to use the old feature matrix.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package initializer and public API facade for the encoder subsystem; re-exports `encode_state`, `encode_choices`, `card_feature_matrix`, `card_summary_matrix`, `trunk_input_dim`, `choice_input_dim`, `EncodingSpec`, `state_size`, and `choice_feature_dim` from submodules.

file_nodes.name: layout.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `EncodingSpec` (the selector between main-game and setup encoding) and computes all top-level dimension constants â€” trunk input, choice input, choice feature, state feature, decision-type, and family counts â€” that wire together the stripe layout and the neural network input layers.

file_nodes.name: state_encode.py
file_nodes.summary: Converts a `GameState` snapshot into a flat float32 numpy array suitable for neural network input, assembling board slots, food, hand, bonus progress, round goals, birdfeeder, and decision-type stripes.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package barrel for the stripes subpackage; re-exports `StripeDescriptor`, `SubFieldDescriptor`, `VectorLayout`, and the four layout functions from sibling modules.

file_nodes.name: card_feature.py
file_nodes.summary: Produces `VectorLayout` descriptors for the card-feature stripe (all 180 bird attribute sub-fields) and the hand-encoder input stripe, used by the HTML report and the compat shim to document and validate vector shapes.

file_nodes.name: choice.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the complete choice encoding vector layout: `raw_choice_stripe_layout` emits per-decision-class stripes with sub-field descriptors for kind, gain-food, payment, board-target, exchange, bonus/goal deltas, and setup aggregates; `choice_stripe_layout` wraps it with embedding substitution.

file_nodes.name: descriptors.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the three Pydantic descriptor types â€” `SubFieldDescriptor`, `StripeDescriptor`, and `VectorLayout` â€” that form the self-documenting layer layout schema used by the HTML report and compat shims.

file_nodes.name: embed_rules.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides `_EmbedRule` descriptor and the four rule-set factory functions (`state_embed_rules`, `setup_embed_rules`, `choice_embed_rules`) plus `embed_layout` which applies rules to a raw `VectorLayout`, replacing card-index stripes with embedding-dimension placeholders for the network's actual input.

file_nodes.name: state.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `state_stripe_layout`, the authoritative `VectorLayout` descriptor for the full game-state tensor covering food, board slots, board summaries, hand, bonus progress, birdfeeder, misc scalars, round goals, card indices, and decision-type stripes.

file_nodes.name: core.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `PolicyValueNet`, the primary PyTorch model for gameplay: builds a card encoder, optional hand encoder, state trunk, per-family choice scorer, and value head from a `ModelArchitecture` config; exposes `encode_state`, `encode_choices`, and `forward` for the training/inference pipeline.

file_nodes.name: hand_model.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides four tensor-manipulation helpers (`multihot_from_indices`, `set_summary_from_indices`, `set_summary_from_multihot`, `embed_card_set`) for converting card index tensors into multi-hot or summary-row representations fed into the hand encoder.

file_nodes.name: mlp.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides `build_body` and `build_readout` factory functions that construct `nn.Sequential` MLP blocks from layer width lists, activation, dropout, and LayerNorm settings, used by all neural network components in the project.

file_nodes.name: html.py
file_nodes.summary: Generates a self-contained HTML architecture report page from the model's encoding layouts, architecture config, and parameter count report, including stripe tables, architecture diagram (embedded SVG), and parameter breakdown.

file_nodes.name: svg.py
file_nodes.summary: Renders the neural-network architecture as an inline SVG diagram with labeled blocks, op rows (Linear/LayerNorm/Activation/Dropout), IO boxes, connector bands between rows, and parameter count badges; entry point is `build_arch_svg`.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package initializer and public API barrel for the setup model subsystem; re-exports `SetupEncoding`, `SetupArchitecture`, `setup_readout_input_dim`, `count_setup_parameters`, `SetupNet`, `generate`, and `record` from submodules.

file_nodes.name: architecture.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `SetupEncoding` (the feature vector structure for game-setup candidates) and `SetupArchitecture` (the neural network config for the setup net), plus `count_setup_parameters` for parameter reporting.

file_nodes.name: candidates.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `SetupCandidate` (the typed representation of one possible initial-setup selection) and `enumerate_setup_candidates` / `select_by_margins` for generating and sampling from the combinatorial space of card+food+bonus choices.

file_nodes.name: encode.py
file_nodes.summary: Converts a `SetupCandidate` and game context into a fixed-length float32 feature vector for the setup net, encoding kept cards, food, bonus affinity, tray indices, birdfeeder state, and round-goal affinity stripes.

file_nodes.name: generate.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides `RandomSetupGenerator`, which samples training-data setup instances by randomly dealing and selecting initial cards and food, using softmax-weighted sampling to create realistic and diverse training data.

file_nodes.name: record.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides `SetupSample` (training record with features, margin, and candidate array) and `SetupDataStore` (append-only JSONL file store with iteration, count, and clear operations) for setup model training data persistence.

file_nodes.name: stripes.py
file_nodes.summary: Produces annotated `VectorLayout` descriptors for the setup candidate input vector (`setup_stripe_layout`) and the setup-net readout input after embedding substitution (`setup_readout_stripe_layout`), mirroring the structure of `encode/stripes/state.py` for the setup domain.

file_nodes.name: setup_learner.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements offline (batch-MSE) and online (per-game actor-critic) training update functions for the setup net: `offline_fit` trains from a stored JSONL dataset, `online_update` from a live sample list, and `actor_critic_update` runs a policy-gradient + value loss update over grouped samples.

file_nodes.name: setup_net.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines `SetupNet`, the PyTorch model for predicting setup quality margins: builds a frozen card encoder, an optional hand encoder, and a readout MLP (with optional policy head for actor-critic mode) from `SetupArchitecture` and `ModelArchitecture` configs.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package init for the cloud module that re-exports all public symbols from monitor, runfile, runner, s3sync, and status submodules.

file_nodes.name: __main__.py
file_nodes.summary: CLI entry point for the cloud module that parses arguments, loads a CloudRunFile (optionally from S3), applies overrides, and launches HeadlessRunner for a remote training run.

file_nodes.name: monitor.py
file_nodes.summary: Live terminal dashboard that polls S3 for RunStatus snapshots from all active cloud training runs and renders them in a Rich table with status LEDs, ETA, and win-rate columns.

file_nodes.name: runfile.py
file_nodes.summary: Pydantic models and parser for the cloud run configuration file, defining S3Config, SyncConfig, and CloudRunFile structures that drive headless training runs.

file_nodes.name: runner.py
file_nodes.summary: HeadlessRunner orchestrates a cloud training session: restores from S3, launches a training thread, supervises progress, periodically uploads checkpoints and game chunks, publishes status snapshots, and handles graceful shutdown on signals.

file_nodes.name: s3sync.py
file_nodes.summary: S3Sync class and utility functions for downloading runs, uploading checkpoints and game chunks, fetching text objects, and listing run statuses from an S3 bucket backing cloud training.

file_nodes.name: status.py
file_nodes.summary: RunStatus Pydantic model and build_status factory that computes a rich training status snapshot from RunState, including win rate, ETA, games-per-second, and evaluation metrics.

file_nodes.name: loaders.py
file_nodes.summary: Checkpoint loading functions for PolicyValueNet and SetupNet, with compat shim routing for v0.0 and v0.1 artifact formats, encoding-key validation, and net reconstruction from run-dir metadata.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package init for the reporting module that re-exports the inspect_cli entry point.

file_nodes.name: inspect_cli.py
file_nodes.summary: Rich terminal CLI for inspecting trained model checkpoints: prints state-encoding layout, choice-encoding stripes, architecture diagram, parameter counts, and optionally writes an HTML report.

file_nodes.name: dashboard.py
file_nodes.summary: Rich-based live terminal dashboard for tournament mode: builds a four-panel layout (header, standings, events, progress) and renders real-time stats from a TournamentLive object.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package init for the training module, re-exporting the main app entry point and serving as the module barrel for consumers like the cloud runner.

file_nodes.name: __main__.py
file_nodes.summary: Minimal Python __main__ that invokes the training app entry point when the training package is run directly via python -m wingspan.training.

file_nodes.name: app.py
file_nodes.summary: Training application entry point: parses CLI args, builds TrainConfig, launches a TrainingLoop in a worker thread, runs the Rich terminal dashboard, and prints a completion summary.

file_nodes.name: artifacts.py
file_nodes.summary: Utility functions for generating canonical checkpoint and final-eval artifact filenames from iteration numbers, used by the training loop for consistent artifact naming.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package init for the training charts subpackage, re-exporting braille canvas, convergence chart, histogram, and inset renderable classes.

file_nodes.name: braille.py
file_nodes.summary: BrailleCanvas class for terminal-based dot-matrix plotting using Unicode Braille characters, with a Bresenham line-drawing algorithm for rendering line series.

file_nodes.name: convergence_chart.py
file_nodes.summary: GettingBetterChart Rich renderable that displays a side-by-side Braille convergence chart with win-rate and score/margin plot blocks, axis labels, inset histograms, and phase markers for the training dashboard.

file_nodes.name: geometry.py
file_nodes.summary: Chart size constants defining pixel-to-braille-cell dimensions and layout proportions used across convergence and inset chart renderers.

file_nodes.name: histogram.py
file_nodes.summary: FamilyHistogram Rich renderable displaying a bar chart of decision-family usage counts for the training dashboard inset, with color-coded tier bars and a total-decisions footer.

file_nodes.name: insets.py
file_nodes.summary: Renders rich text inset and strip widgets for the training dashboard, displaying eval and collect phase metrics (win-rate EWMA, margin, game counts) as formatted terminal panels.

file_nodes.name: text_helpers.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides low-level text rendering utilities for terminal chart components: Unicode sparkline generation, eighth-block bar rendering, human-readable number formatting, and multi-column layout joining.

file_nodes.name: arch_diagram.py
file_nodes.summary: Renders an interactive and static terminal architecture diagram of the PolicyValueNet and SetupNet, showing layer shapes, parameter counts, and data flow using Rich Text box-drawing primitives.

file_nodes.name: convergence.py
file_nodes.summary: Computes EWMA series and axis ranges for training convergence charts, including win-rate, score, and margin curves with regime-aware data point handling.

file_nodes.name: dashboard.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements the real-time terminal training dashboard using Rich layouts, rendering header stats, production metrics, learning charts, health indicators, and a pause/command panel.

file_nodes.name: loop.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the TrainingLoop class orchestrating the RL self-play training cycle: game collection, model updates, evaluation, checkpointing, and system monitoring across all training phases.

file_nodes.name: loop_checkpoint.py
file_nodes.summary: Handles iteration-level checkpointing and artifact persistence: saving model weights, game history logs, metrics, and writing final run summaries to disk atomically.

file_nodes.name: loop_eval.py
file_nodes.summary: Manages periodic evaluation against a frozen opponent, opponent promotion logic (graduation from random phase, advancing to stronger opponent snapshots), and eval result recording.

file_nodes.name: loop_resume.py
file_nodes.summary: Handles training run resumption from checkpoints: loading saved weights and optimizer state, initializing phase, target, and history logs for fresh or resumed runs.

file_nodes.name: loop_setup.py
file_nodes.summary: Manages setup phase logic for each training iteration: determining if setup phase is active, running offline setup network fitting, syncing embedder weights between main and setup nets, and resuming from setup checkpoints.

file_nodes.name: loop_target.py
file_nodes.summary: Handles the target iteration event: checking if a target iteration has been reached, pausing to query the user for a new target, and resuming the loop after the response.

file_nodes.name: metrics.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines all Pydantic data models for training metrics: score breakdowns, family counts, eval results, EWMA accumulators, iteration metrics, game outcomes, and system stats.

file_nodes.name: metrics_log.py
file_nodes.summary: Reads and caches the per-iteration metrics log from disk (JSONL format), providing the iteration history as a list of IterationMetrics for chart and convergence computations.

file_nodes.name: runmeta.py
file_nodes.summary: Manages run metadata persistence: writing and reading model configs, session records, inspect reports, and HTML model summaries; also provides layout and dimension reporting utilities used by the dashboard and arch diagram.

file_nodes.name: runstate.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines RunState â€” the central mutable state object for a training run â€” tracking game history, EWMA metrics, timing, eval history, events, and progress; includes Phase and TrainingPhase enums.

file_nodes.name: setup_runmeta.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides the SetupConfig Pydantic model and functions to write and read setup model configuration artifacts alongside setup checkpoints.

file_nodes.name: sysmon.py
file_nodes.summary: Implements SystemMonitor, a background sampler that periodically reads CPU, RAM, and GPU utilization metrics using psutil and pynvml for display in the training dashboard health panel.

file_nodes.name: theme.py
file_nodes.summary: Provides color theming utilities for the training dashboard: lerp/gradient color generation, gradient-rendered text, and win-rate-dependent hero color selection.

file_nodes.name: version.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the Version model and artifact compatibility logic: parsing version strings, checking artifact compatibility against MODEL_VERSION, and adapting old encoding specs via compat shims.

file_nodes.name: __init__.py
file_nodes.summary: Package entry point for the agents subpackage, re-exporting the primary agent constructors (random_agent and cli_agent) for use throughout the training and play pipelines.

file_nodes.name: base.py
file_nodes.summary: Defines the reference random agent â€” a factory returning a closure that satisfies the Agent protocol by sampling uniformly from the offered choices using a provided RNG.
